name: music-flamingo-audio-language-model-scaling
description: Scale multimodal understanding to music and audio domains, building language models that comprehend and reason about musical content. Trigger: When building audio-understanding agents or music analysis systems
paperTitle: Music Flamingo: Audio Language Model Scaling
content:
## Music Flamingo: Audio Language Model Scaling

Scale multimodal understanding to music and audio domains, building language models that comprehend and reason about musical content.

### Core Concept

Multimodal framework extending language models to music domain

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.10289

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When building audio-understanding agents or music analysis systems
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: Music Flamingo: Scaling Music Understanding in Audio Language Models
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.10289
